headline: Caterpillar Tax Shift Boosts Cash While Clouding Earnings Picture For Investors
summary: U.S. corporate tax law changes for 2025 reduce Caterpillar's federal cash tax payments while increasing its reported book tax rate. Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) highlights that accelerated deductions in the new law are especially relevant for capital-intensive businesses. The company indicates these tax provisions influence its future cash flows and financial planning. Caterpillar, the heavy equipment manufacturer listed as NYSE:CAT, operates in sectors that require substantial investment in...

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Caterpillar (CAT) Amid Middle East Tensions And AI Power Push
summary: In late March 2026, Caterpillar was caught up in market swings as escalating, then easing, Middle East tensions shifted sentiment around global energy supply and industrial demand. Beyond the geopolitical noise, Caterpillar’s push into AI-enabled power solutions and data center infrastructure highlights how its traditional machinery business is increasingly tied to digital and energy resilience trends. Next, we’ll examine how de-escalating Middle East tensions and Caterpillar’s growing role...
